raw.message: Whirl our Daily Free Spin for free chances to win cash & more at Gala.

hook.summary: Surreal visual of fruit popping off a man's shirt into his hands.
hook.visual_action: A man in a pink fruit-patterned sweatshirt watches as lemons and pineapples detach from the fabric and become physical objects.
hook.text_overlay: Where a little Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
hook.voiceover_transcript: Join Gala to get your daily free spin.

scene_flow: Close-up of a man in a pink fruit-patterned sweatshirt as fruit physically pops off the fabric.
The man catches the fruit and walks through a vibrant outdoor fruit market as pineapples on his shirt turn into real fruit.
The brand slogan 'Where a little Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY' appears over the market scene.
Transition to a bright yellow screen featuring the blue Gala brand logo.
Final screen displays a mandatory responsible gambling message 'TAKE TIME TO THINK' on a black background.
on_screen_text: Where a little Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
audience_proxy: UK adults 25-55 looking for casual entertainment and daily gaming rewards.
